584 SCTNG_SCHLD_DSCHRG_CD SCTNG_SCHLD_DSCHRG_CD Therapies: Suctioning - Scheduled (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving scheduled suctioning therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
